ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player based on performance */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the player */,
  "favorite_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's favorite game */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical description of the player */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the player */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., FPS, RPG) */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game developer */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game publisher */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game modes available (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players supported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES game_publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES game_developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by players */,
  "won_variants" INTEGER /* Number of variants won by players */,
  "attempts_per_win" REAL /* Ratio of attempts to wins */,
  "match_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the match (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  "lobby_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lobby where the match was played */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning player */,
  "match_duration" REAL /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to these statistics */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total attempts made in the match */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the match */,
  "average_attempts_per_win" REAL /* Average attempts per win */,
  "median_match_duration" REAL /* Median duration of matches */,
  "average_player_rating" REAL /* Average rating of players */,
  "winning_streak" INTEGER /* Current winning streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., single-elimination, round-robin) */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES tournament_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_matches" (
  "tournament_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match played in the tournament */,
  "match_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the match in the tournament */,
  "match_round" INTEGER /* Round number of the match in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the feedback */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the player */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Helpfulness of the feedback (e.g., useful, not useful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaders" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the leaderboard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the player's performance (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaders_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaders_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played during the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the gaming session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements unlocked during the session */,
  "level_reached" INTEGER /* Highest level reached during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the analytics */,
  "average_attempts" REAL /* Average number of attempts made by the player */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Winning rate of the player in percentage */,
  "avg_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the player in seconds */,
  "avg_score_per_minute" REAL /* Average score per minute of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lobbies" (
  "lobby_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lobby */,
  "lobby_name" TEXT /* Name of the lobby */,
  "lobby_type" TEXT /* Type of lobby (e.g., public, private) */,
  "lobby_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the lobby */,
  "lobby_description" TEXT /* Description of the lobby */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lobby_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "developer_description" TEXT /* Description of the game developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the game publisher */,
  "publisher_description" TEXT /* Description of the game publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament organizer */,
  "organizer_description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the award was given */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Best Score) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_awards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player at the time */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the player at the time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_history_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES leaders ("leader_id")
)
